qa_rules.rule: There must be exactly one visually dominant task or prompt region per page.
Support cue regions must be smaller or lower contrast than main prompt regions.
At least one component family per page must use softer corners or tab treatment.
Student writing regions must have more open white area than adjacent prompt boxes.
Support tools and success check cannot share identical fill, icon, and border treatment.
A 5-slide sequence must use at least 3 layout patterns.
Reflection slides must use fewer content blocks than model or task slides.
No page may use more than 3 accent roles.

fails_when: a page has more than one main_prompt region
support_cue area is equal to or larger than main_prompt area
a page has no major component with soft/round/pill radius treatment
student_response area is smaller than adjacent main_prompt area
support_tools and success_check share identical fill_mode, border_mode, and show_icon
five-slide sequence uses fewer than three unique layout ids
three or more consecutive slides share the same layout id
reflection slides use as many or more major content blocks than model/task slides on average
a page uses more than three unique accent roles
